MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Romy Barulich.
Appearances:
Christopher Hays, Esq. for Plaintiff Jeffrey C. Lee. Plaintiff, presently in Hong Kong, appeared by declaration. No appearances by defendants.
After hearing the evidence presented including plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Jeffrey C. Lee and against the defendants James P. Schach; Sandra Ferrari Schach; San Francisco Fresh Crab Co.; Auality Seafood Co.; J & S Quality Seafood Inc. on the 4 causes of action. Plaintif's counsel to re-submit Judgment, clearly identifying Principal, Interest, Costs and Attorney Fees for a Total Judgment of $136,360.09
